topics.topic: Dyatlov Pass Incident: Russia ke pahado mein un 9 trekkers ke saath kya hua tha?
Mary Celeste: Samundar ke beech se bina kisi nishaan ke gayab hui puri crew ka raaz
The Dancing Plague of 1518: Jab log naachte-naachte marne lage!
Shanti Devi Case: India ka sabse hairan karne wala Real Reincarnation (Punarjanam) ka sach
The Sodder Children Disappearance: Aag ke beech se 5 bachhe kaise gayab ho gaye?
Wow! Signal: Kya sach mein humein aliens ka message mila tha?
Lake Natron: Ek aisi jheel jo her ek jaanwar ko patthar bana deti hai
The Oak Island Money Pit: 200 saal se chhupa khazana jo aaj tak koi nahi dhund paya
Roanoke Colony: Ek hi raat mein pura gaon aur uske log kahan gayab ho gaye?
The Man from Taured: Ek aise desh ka musafir jo real world mein exist hi nahi karta
The Green Children of Woolpit: Hare rang ke bachhe jo achanak dharti par prakat hue
Lake Anjikuni: Pura Eskimo kabeela raaton-raat hawa mein kaise gayab hua?
The Lead Masks Case: Brazil ki pahadiyo par mili do ajeeb lashein aur unke metallic masks
Klerksdorp Spheres: Millions of years purane patthar jo humans ne nahi banaye
Tarrare: History ka sabse bhukkad insaan jo mitti, kachra aur billi tak kha jata tha
Ourang Medan: Ship par sabki maut ek saath kaise hui? Ek ajeeb sangeen raaz
Gobekli Tepe: History se bhi purana mandir jisne human evolution ki thory ko badal diya
The Voynich Manuscript: Ek aisi rahasyamayi kitaab jise aaj tak koi nahi padh paya
Silent Twins: Do behne jo sirf ek doosre se apni khud ki language mein baat karti thin
The Kentucky Meat Shower: Jab achanak aasmaan se meat ke tukdo ki baarish hone lagi
